name: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter Lavender 5l
description: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter Lavender is a 100% natural, non-toxic bentonite clay litter designed to provide superior cleanliness and long-lasting freshness. Its fine-grain texture ensures fast, firm clumping for easy waste removal, while the calming lavender scent keeps your cat’s litter box smelling pleasant throughout the day. Perfect for multi-cat households or pet owners seeking a premium hygiene solution. Key Features Powerful Clumping Action: Instantly forms tight, easy-to-scoop clumps that help maintain a clean and dry litter box. Effective Odor Control: Neutralizes unpleasant smells while releasing a soothing lavender fragrance for lasting freshness. Natural & Safe: Made entirely from natural bentonite clay — non-toxic, absorbent, and gentle on your cat’s paws. Low Dust Formula: Minimizes tracking and airborne particles, creating a cleaner environment for both cats and owners. Enhanced Hygiene: Inhibits bacterial growth in the litter box, promoting a healthier space for your cat. Fine Grain Texture: Ensures maximum absorbency and efficient clumping performance. Usage Instructions Fill the litter box with 7–8 cm of litter . Remove clumps and solid waste daily to maintain freshness. Refill with fresh litter as needed to maintain depth and performance. Wash hands thoroughly after handling used litter, especially for children, the elderly, or pregnant women. Storage Information Store in a cool, dry place away from moisture and direct sunlight. Keep tightly sealed to preserve freshness and prevent contamination.
